articles.summary: 针对视频推理语言模型盲目信任每帧质量的缺陷（盲信问题），提出置信度感知的工具编排方法，在运动模糊、眩光等扰动下准确率下降15-30%的环境中，动态评估帧可靠性并选择合适工具，显著提升鲁棒性。

articles.title: OPID: On-Policy Skill Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Outcome-based reinforcement learning provides a stable optimization backbone for language agents, but its sparse trajectory-level rewards provide little guidance on which intermediate decisions should be reinforced or suppressed. On-policy self-distillation offers dense token-level supervision, yet existing skill-conditioned variants often rely on external skill memories or retrieved privileged co
articles.summary: OPID提出在线策略技能蒸馏方法，为语言智能体提供密集的token级监督信号，克服基于结果的强化学习中轨迹级奖励稀疏无法指导中间决策的问题，无需外部技能记忆即可稳定优化。

articles.title: In-Context World Modeling for Robotic Control
articles.excerpt: Modern Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models often fail to generalize to novel setups, such as altered camera viewpoints or robot morphologies, because they are typically conditioned only on current observations and language instructions. By ignoring the underlying system configuration as a variable, these models implicitly assume a fixed execution context encountered during training, necessitating
articles.summary: 针对视觉-语言-动作模型因忽略系统配置变量（如相机视角、机器人形态）导致泛化失败的问题，提出上下文世界建模方法，将系统配置作为变量融入推理，无需重新训练即可适应新环境。

articles.title: Running the Gauntlet: Re-evaluating the Capabilities of Agents Beyond Familiar Environments
articles.excerpt: As agentic systems continue to evolve and are widely deployed in real-world scenarios, there is a growing demand to faithfully evaluate their capabilities. However, current benchmarks are typically built on popular applications with relatively simple tasks and focus on a narrow set of capabilities while overlooking broader dimensions, resulting in saturated performance on modern agents and failing
articles.summary: 当前智能体基准过于简单且聚焦窄维度导致性能饱和，提出Running the Gauntlet评估框架，涵盖更广泛、更现实的任务和能力维度，以真实反映智能体在陌生环境中的泛化能力。

articles.title: COrigami: An AI Pipeline for Co-Designing Flat-Foldable Visually Recognisable Origami
articles.excerpt: While generative AI has achieved remarkable success in solving problems with verifiable solutions, generating physical art that satisfies both strict geometric constraints and subjective visual aesthetics remains a challenge. This paper presents an approach to tackle these difficulties in the domain of computational origami, a mathematically rigid environment that grounds artistic design within th
articles.summary: COrigami提出AI管线协同设计可平折且视觉可识别的折纸，在满足严格几何约束的同时兼顾主观美学，利用生成模型在数学严谨的折纸环境中实现艺术与可靠性的平衡。

articles.title: Fast LeWorldModel
articles.excerpt: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs), including recent LeWorldModel (LeWM), have become a promising foundation for reconstruction-free visual world models. For visual planning, however, LeWM evaluates candidate action sequences by repeatedly applying a local one-step latent transition model. This autoregressive rollout makes planning computationally expensive and exposes the predicted
articles.summary: 针对LeWorldModel视觉规划中自回归滚转计算昂贵的问题，提出Fast LeWorldModel，通过改进潜在状态转移策略加速规划，在不显著损失准确性的前提下提升推理效率。

articles.title: Neglected Free Lunch from Post-training: Progress Advantage for LLM Agents
articles.excerpt: Process reward models enable fine-grained, step-level evaluation of LLMs, yet building them for agentic settings remains prohibitively difficult: long-horizon interactions, irreversible actions, and stochastic environment feedback make both human annotation and Monte Carlo estimation infeasible at scale. In this work, we show that reinforcement learning (RL) post-training already provides the ingr
articles.summary: 发现强化学习后训练已隐含步骤级进步优势信号，可利用该免费午餐替代昂贵的过程奖励模型，为语言智能体提供细粒度监督，避免长程交互中人工标注和蒙特卡洛估计的困难。

articles.title: Why Multi-Step Tool-Use Reinforcement Learning Collapses and How Supervisory Signals Fix It
articles.excerpt: Tool use enables large language models (LLMs) to perform complex tasks, and recent agentic reinforcement learning (RL) methods show promise for enhancing model capabilities. However, RL alone often leads to instability or limited gains in tool-use tasks. In our experiments, some models exhibit catastrophic collapse, where performance abruptly drops and tool-invocation structures fail. The analysis
articles.summary: 分析多步骤工具使用强化学习中的灾难性崩溃现象，发现奖励稀疏和探索不足是主因，提出引入额外监督信号（如过程奖励或行为克隆）稳定训练，防止工具调用结构失效。

articles.title: Autodata: An agentic data scientist to create high quality synthetic data
articles.excerpt: We introduce Autodata, a general method that enables AI agents to act as data scientists who build high quality training and evaluation data. We show how to train (meta-optimize) such a data scientist agent, so that it learns to create even stronger data. We describe the overall formulation, and a specific practical implementation, Agentic Self-Instruct. We conduct experiments on computer science
articles.summary: Autodata提出通用方法让AI智能体扮演数据科学家，通过元优化训练其自主生成高质量训练与评估数据。具体实现Agentic Self-Instruct，在计算机科学等任务上验证了生成数据能持续提升模型性能。

articles.summary: 一架小型飞机撞击北京第一高楼“中国尊”，位于国贸CBD，距天安门数公里。事故造成1人死亡、13人受伤，驾驶员丧生。

articles.excerpt: 与美国或一些亚洲国家不同，德国以及北欧许多住家没有安装空调。但随着炎热天气增加，情形正在发生改变。

articles.title: 德国海军“最大战舰”项目取消 被批“白白损失23亿欧元”

articles.title: DW專訪黎智英之女：相信香港人終究愛自由
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/dw專訪黎智英之女：相信香港人終究愛自由/a-77696637?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 6月23日，身陷囹圄的香港傳媒大亨黎智英正式獲頒德國之聲言論自由獎。他的女兒黎釆在德國之聲波昂總部代其父親領獎並接受DW專訪。她表示，單純靠香港內部的運作幾乎不可能讓父親出獄，只能寄望外部施壓。黎釆還說，相信香港人最終都是愛自由的。

articles.title: 德语媒体：科研合作不能无视国家安全

articles.title: 中国驻欧盟大使：中国与欧洲“是伙伴，不是对手，更不是敌人”

articles.title: 两名日本人在华被拘 或涉稀土管制
